title: malaxis licatae
intro: Malaxis licatae, also known as the Licata's malaxis or Licata's orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Malaxis licatae is typically dried and used as a tea or infusions, or made into a topical cream or ointment for external use.
